Description

  • Uses of MapManager in pgl.app.controller

    Methods in pgl.app.controller with parameters of type MapManager
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    MapController.setMapManager(MapManager mapManager)
    Injects the application's global core business engine context resource references.
    void
    SidebarController.setMapManager(MapManager mapManager)
    Injects the shared application MapManager dependency model data context

  • Uses of MapManager in pgl.app.io

    Methods in pgl.app.io with parameters of type MapManager
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    MapBinarySerializer.export(MapManager manager, OutputStream out)
    Serializes the model content (intersections, roads, hospitals, incidents) into a binary output stream.
    static void
    MapBinarySerializer.exportToFile(MapManager manager, Path file)
    Exports the current state of the map manager to a file on the disk.
    static void
    MapBinarySerializer.importFromFile(MapManager manager, Path file)
    Imports map data from a binary file and loads it into the manager.
    static void
    MapImporterOSM.importFromOSM(MapManager manager, Path jsonFile)
    Imports a road network from an OSM JSON file and populates the provided MapManager.
    static void
    MapBinarySerializer.importMap(MapManager manager, InputStream in)
    Deserializes and reconstructs the map state from a binary input stream.

  • Uses of MapManager in pgl.app.test

    Methods in pgl.app.test with parameters of type MapManager
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    SimulationDataGenerator.generateRandomRoads(MapManager mapManager, int nbRoads)
    Injects a randomized, multi-weighted grid network of roads interconnecting registered active hospital nodes.
